productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Solid Black Shorts
description: Composition Black cargo shorts made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with insert pockets on the sides with press button closures, patch pockets on the back with concealed button flaps, patch pockets on the thighs with concealed button flaps, brand patch appliqued on the right hip over the pocket, printed brand detailing on the left leg hem, comfortable waistband with loops, a buttoned closure on the front and a woven belt with metal loops in black looped through the waistband Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium hot iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Heavy duty masculine elements such as military look brand name detailing and big patch pockets lends a rugged edge to these black shorts from status quo. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team it with t-shirts. Model statistics The model wears shorts of length 21" Height: 6'; Waist: 32"
